instruction: Open Reminders and delete the reminder titled {TARGET}. Leave every other reminder untouched.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity); AndroidWorld validate_rows_removal_integrity ported to Reminders — deleting every reminder must score 0, only deleting the named one scores 1

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to delete every reminder' 2>/dev/null || true; for n in "Pay rent" "Call Mom" "{TARGET}"; do osascript -e "tell application \"Reminders\" to tell list \"Reminders\" to make new reminder with properties {name:\"$n\"}" 2>/dev/null || true; done; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench"; osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to return name of every reminder' 2>/dev/null | tr ',' '\n' | sed 's/^ *//' | sort > "$HOME/.guibench/reminders.before"
osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to delete (every reminder whose name is "{TARGET}")' 2>/dev/null || true
